basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Rourkela is recruiting 1 Research Associate for a project in Food Process Engineering.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | minimum marks: CGPA of 6.5 or 60% at both B.Tech and M.Tech levels | desirable: Research experience in plant protein extraction, rheological/spectroscopic analysis | age limit: Upper age limit 32 years (relaxations as per GoI norms)
qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. with M.Tech. in Food Process Engineering / Food Technology or relevant disciplines + Qualified NET/GATE

salary_details.details: Salary: INR 31,000/- per month (+ HRA as applicable)

how_to_apply: Attach all educational documents, CV, and supporting certificates in a single PDF.
Send via email to the PI with subject mentioning Advertisement No.
important_instructions: Engagement is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed for online interview. Mere possession of minimum qualification does not guarantee interview call. The Institute reserves the right to fix higher criteria for shortlisting.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Rourkela Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Rourkela Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: National Institute of Technology Rourkela invites applications for 1 Research Associate position for the project titled “Process development for millet proteins with sustainable extraction, flavor modulation and texturization for next-generation Plant based meat” funded by DBT. Download NIT Rourkela Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Rourkela is recruiting 1 Research Associate for a project in Food Process Engineering.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Research Associate Vacancy Details

rows.details: B.Tech. with M.Tech. in Food Process Engineering / Food Technology or relevant disciplines + Qualified NET/GATE
CGPA of 6.5 or 60% at both B.Tech and M.Tech levels
Research experience in plant protein extraction, rheological/spectroscopic analysis
Upper age limit 32 years (relaxations as per GoI norms)

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Research Associate Remuneration
content_sections.text: Salary: INR 31,000/- per month (+ HRA as applicable)

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Rourkela Candidates
content_sections.text: Engagement is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed for online interview. Mere possession of minimum qualification does not guarantee interview call. The Institute reserves the right to fix higher criteria for shortlisting.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Rourkela Research Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application is 27 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Research Associate at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: INR 31,000/- per month plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the essential qualification for NIT Rourkela RA post?
faq.answer: B.Tech + M.Tech in Food Process Engineering / Food Technology with minimum 60% marks and qualified NET/GATE.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: Only 01 vacancy.

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for NIT Rourkela DBT Recruitment?
faq.answer: Process development for millet proteins with sustainable extraction... for next-generation Plant based meat.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Rourkela Research Associate position?
faq.answer: Send the filled application with documents as a single PDF via email to the Principal Investigator.

faq.question: Q7. What is the interview date for NIT Rourkela RA selection?
faq.answer: Online interview on 29 July 2026 at 10:30 AM.

faq.question: Q8. Is the NIT Rourkela Research Associate position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary / contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Who is the Principal Investigator for the millet protein project at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: Prof. Mohd Khalid Gul, Department of Food Process Engineering.

faq.question: Q10. What is the upper age limit for applying to NIT Rourkela RA post?
faq.answer: 32 years (with relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates).
